prompts.title: Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Prompt library: import a JSON batch, edit or delete.
prompts.importHint: Paste a JSON array of { titre, prompt_text, … } objects. Automatic content-based deduplication.
prompts.importInvalid: Invalid JSON: an array of objects is expected.
prompts.empty: No prompts yet. Import a first batch above.
prompts.dbError: Database unreachable. Set DATABASE_URL in .env and start Postgres, then retry.
prompts.editRequired: Title and prompt text are required.
prompts.editDuplicate: Duplicate: another prompt already has this text.
prompts.actionError: The action failed. Please try again.

accueil.title: Home page
accueil.subtitle: Pick a page from the menu or use the shortcuts below.

placeholder.subtitle: Temporary content for page {page}.
placeholder.replaces: This section replaces the previous page.

dashboard.subtitle: Your creation console: from idea to revenue.

pages.comingSoonHint: This section is part of the skeleton. Add your content here.

radar.title: Radar
radar.subtitle: Claude queries the web live: the niches that are working right now (with their demonetization risk) and the tools of the moment worth knowing.
radar.error: The scan didn't complete. Try again — the analysis queries the web live and can take a moment.
radar.empty: The radar is off. Run a scan to see the niches of the moment.
radar.emptyHint: Reminder: a “hot” niche without a human angle is still demonetizable. The radar rates that risk.

tools.title: Tools of the moment
tools.subtitle: Editing, voice, visuals, captions, publishing — what's recommended right now, with the pitfalls (pricing, watermark, rights) to know.
tools.error: The watch didn't complete. Try again — it queries the web live.
tools.empty: Run the watch to see the tools recommended right now, and especially what changed recently.

pipeline.title: Pipeline
pipeline.subtitle: Every video, from idea to revenue. Saved automatically on this device.
pipeline.empty: No cards yet. Add an idea above.

reperes.title: Reference
reperes.subtitle: The platform reality, without the course-sellers' pitch.

parametres.title: Settings
parametres.subtitle: Tune what the radar and the studio take into account.
parametres.categoriesHint: The niche scan is limited to the checked categories. If you uncheck them all, the radar explores all of them.
parametres.providerHint: Anthropic (Claude) = cloud, billed per use. Hybrid = 100% local and free (Ollama + SearXNG) — slower, and requires Ollama + the SearXNG container running.
parametres.ollamaModelHint: Local model for generation, among those installed on this machine. qwen2.5:7b = better quality; llama3.2:3b = faster.
parametres.ollamaEmpty: No Ollama model detected. Is Ollama running? (install one with “ollama pull”)
parametres.usageHint: Local estimate of what the app consumed via the Anthropic API since the last reset. The exact balance stays on console.anthropic.com.
parametres.usageBudgetHint: Warns when the cumulative cost exceeds this amount. 0 = disabled.
parametres.usageOver: Budget exceeded — consider Haiku or hybrid mode.
parametres.usageEmpty: No usage recorded yet (local hybrid mode doesn't count).
parametres.dataHint: Export everything (pipeline, favorites, settings, radar) to a file, or re-import it on another machine. Import replaces current data.
parametres.modelHint: The model used for scans and generations. The server only accepts models from the list.
parametres.steppersTip: Tip: start small (5–10 ideas) so you don't get overwhelmed. Increase once you've got your publishing rhythm down.
parametres.nicheCountHint: Size of the top list generated by the scan.
parametres.batchCountHint: Number of videos/slideshows proposed at once. Beyond ~25, the list may be truncated.
parametres.weekGoalHint: Target for the consistency bar in the Pipeline.

atelier.title: Studio
atelier.subtitle: A batch of ideas (videos, slideshows or mixed) per niche, or a script on your own topic.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.empty: No favorites yet. Click the star on an idea or a script to save it.

batch.error: The batch didn't complete. Try again — a large number of ideas can take a while, and beyond ~25 the list may be truncated.
batch.empty: Pick a niche and run the batch. You can expand each idea into a full script, or send it straight to the pipeline.

custom.title: Write your own topic
custom.subtitle: An idea that's not in the list? Enter it here, pick the format, and Claude generates the full script (hook, breakdown, caption, hashtags, human angle).
custom.topicPlaceholder: e.g. compare 3 AIs on the same prompt and give my verdict
custom.error: Generation failed. Rephrase the topic and try again.
